changes.before: The river slipped past the mill pilings with a thin secretive sound, water moving through a place that had stopped being worth passing through.
changes.after: The river slipped past the mill pilings with a thin secretive sound.

changes.before: Lyriel had slung her bow to report, which she only did when the threat had stepped back.
changes.after: Lyriel had slung her bow to report, a thing she saved for moments when the houses stayed quiet long enough to risk it.

changes.before: Lyriel found it on the second pass through the houses, after the ground search had given them all it was going to give and the work had shifted from spoor to living bodies.
changes.after: Lyriel found it on the second pass through the houses, after they had taken all they could from the ground search and the work had shifted from spoor to living bodies.

changes.before: She made no sound at all. That was worse than screaming.
changes.after: She made no sound at all.

changes.before: Sylvanas knew that from the same place she knew kill ranges and approach lines: long practice at reading what made living things hold still and what made them bolt.
changes.after: Sylvanas knew that from long practice at reading what made living things hold still and what made them bolt.

changes.before: Her stare went north, to the dark gap between the garden walls.
changes.after: She stared north, at the dark gap between the garden walls.

changes.before: Miri's account and the churned ground pointed the same way. Jaina gave one short nod. Same conclusion.
changes.after: Miri's account and the churned ground pointed the same way. Jaina gave one short nod.

changes.before: Beyond the cut, the land had flattened into dark fields and hedge lines, the kind of country where sixty walking dead could move for miles at night and leave nothing for anyone but a ranger to read in the morning.
changes.after: Beyond the cut, the land had flattened into dark fields and hedge lines.

changes.before: The flat oval of a field mark was enough to tell the next post this had come off the road instead of out of an office.
changes.after: The next post would read the flat oval field mark and know this had come off the road.
